languages.text: {n}Старик впивается в вас бешеным взглядом и начинает жалобно выть:{/n} "Лорд-капитан, помогите! Эти нелюди хотят у меня ноги отрезать! Я старшим наводчиком на макропушке служил, ног еще в молодости лишился, только благодаря импланту мог долг исполнять, команды тягачей направлять! А теперь говорят, что все, надо ноги вернуть, а как я их верну? Мясорубы!"

traits.locale_text: они мне ноги отпиливают, а я честно вам служил!

languages.text: {n}The old man's frantic gaze latches on to you and he begins wailing piteously:{/n} "Lord Captain, please help me! These beasts want to cut off my legs! I was a senior gunner on a macro-cannon. I lost my legs in my youth — it was only thanks to my implant I was able to fulfil my duty, guiding teams of haulers! And now they say that that's it, I have to give my legs back, but how can I give them back? Butchers!"
languages.original_text: {n}Старик впивается в вас бешеным взглядом и начинает жалобно выть:{/n} "Лорд-капитан, помогите! Эти нелюди хотят у меня ноги отрезать! Я старшим наводчиком на макропушке служил, ног еще в молодости лишился, только благодаря импланту мог долг исполнять, команды тягачей направлять! А теперь говорят, что все, надо ноги вернуть, а как я их верну? Мясорубы!"

languages.text: {n}老人の狂った視線があなたに釘付けになり、彼は悲痛な声で叫ぶ:{/n}「艦長様、助けてください！この野郎どもが私の足を切り落とそうとしてるんです！私はマクロキャノン隊の砲手長でした。若さで足を失ってしまい、義足のおかげでチームの荷役を指揮することができました。でも、もう終わりだと。足を返さなければならないと言われているんです。でも、どうやって返せるんです！畜生！」
languages.original_text: {n}The old man's frantic gaze latches on to you and he begins wailing piteously:{/n} "Lord Captain, please help me! These beasts want to cut off my legs! I was a senior gunner on a macro-cannon. I lost my legs in my youth — it was only thanks to my implant I was able to fulfil my duty, guiding teams of haulers! And now they say that that's it, I have to give my legs back, but how can I give them back? Butchers!"

traits.locale_text: {n}老人の狂った視線があなたに釘付けになり、彼は悲痛な声で叫ぶ:{/n}「艦長様、助けてください！この野郎どもが私の足を切り落とそうとしてるんです！私はマクロキャノン隊の砲手長でした。若さで足を失ってしまい、義足のおかげでチームの荷役を指揮することができました。でも、もう終わりだと。足を返さなければならないと言われているんです。でも、どうやって返せるんです！畜生！」

languages.text: {n}Yaşlı adamın çılgın bakışları sana kilitleniyor, acıklı bir şekilde sızlanmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan, yalvarırım yardım edin! Bu hayvanlar, bacaklarımı kesmek istiyor! Kıdemli bir makro top topçusuydum. Bacaklarımı gençken kaybettim. İmplantım sayesinde görevimi yerine getirebildim, kargo taşıyıcılara rehberlik ettim! Şimdi kalkmış işimin bittiğini, bacaklarımı geri vermem gerektiğini söylüyorlar. Onları nasıl geri vereyim? Kasaplar!"
languages.original_text: {n}The old man's frantic gaze latches on to you and he begins wailing piteously:{/n} "Lord Captain, please help me! These beasts want to cut off my legs! I was a senior gunner on a macro-cannon. I lost my legs in my youth — it was only thanks to my implant I was able to fulfil my duty, guiding teams of haulers! And now they say that that's it, I have to give my legs back, but how can I give them back? Butchers!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Yaşlı adamın çılgın bakışları sana kilitleniyor, acıklı bir şekilde sızlanmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan, yalvarırım yardım edin! Bu hayvanlar, bacaklarımı kesmek istiyor! Kıdemli bir makro top topçusuydum. Bacaklarımı gençken kaybettim. İmplantım sayesinde görevimi yerine getirebildim, kargo taşıyıcılara rehberlik ettim! Şimdi kalkmış işimin bittiğini, bacaklarımı geri vermem gerektiğini söylüyorlar. Onları nasıl geri vereyim? Kasaplar!"

languages.text: {n}La mirada frenética del anciano se aferra a ti y empieza a gimotear, lastimero:{/n} «¡Lord Capitán, por favor, ayúdeme! ¡Estos animales quieren cortarme las piernas! Era artillero veterano de macrocañón. Perdí las piernas de joven, ¡este implante fue lo que me permitió cumplir con mi deber y guiar a los equipos de transportistas! Y ahora dice que se acabó, que tengo que devolverles mis piernas, pero ¿cómo voy a hacer eso? ¡Carniceros!».

I was a senior gunner on a macro-cannon. I lost my legs in my youth — it was only thanks to my implant I was able to fulfil my duty, guiding teams of haulers! And now they say that that's it, I have to give my legs back, but how can I give them back? Butchers!"

Era artillero veterano de macrocañón. Perdí las piernas de joven, ¡este implante fue lo que me permitió cumplir con mi deber y guiar a los equipos de transportistas! Y ahora dice que se acabó, que tengo que devolverles mis piernas, pero ¿cómo voy a hacer eso? ¡Carniceros!».

languages.text: {n}老人惊恐的目光锁定了你，哀号道，{/n}“舰长大人，求您救救我！这群畜生想切掉我的腿！我以前是宏炮的高阶炮手，年轻时就失去了双腿——多亏了这些植入物，我才能履行职责，指挥成群结队的运输机！现在他们说行了可以了，赶紧把腿还回来吧，可我怎么能还回去？一群屠夫！”
languages.original_text: {n}The old man's frantic gaze latches on to you and he begins wailing piteously:{/n} "Lord Captain, please help me! These beasts want to cut off my legs! I was a senior gunner on a macro-cannon. I lost my legs in my youth — it was only thanks to my implant I was able to fulfil my duty, guiding teams of haulers! And now they say that that's it, I have to give my legs back, but how can I give them back? Butchers!"

traits.locale_text: {n}老人惊恐的目光锁定了你，哀号道，{/n}“舰长大人，求您救救我！这群畜生想切掉我的腿！我以前是宏炮的高阶炮手，年轻时就失去了双腿——多亏了这些植入物，我才能履行职责，指挥成群结队的运输机！现在他们说行了可以了，赶紧把腿还回来吧，可我怎么能还回去？一群屠夫！”

languages.text: {n}Le vieil homme éperdu pose les yeux sur vous et commence à gémir pitoyablement :{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, aidez-moi, je vous en supplie ! Ces monstres veulent me couper les jambes ! J'étais artilleur en chef sur un macro-canon. Après avoir perdu mes jambes dans ma jeunesse, c'est uniquement grâce à mes implants que j'ai pu accomplir mon devoir en guidant des équipes de transporteurs ! Et maintenant qu'ils considèrent que je suis bon à mettre au rebut, ils veulent que je rende mes jambes... mais comment le pourrais-je ? Des bouchers, voilà ce qu'ils sont ! »
languages.original_text: {n}The old man's frantic gaze latches on to you and he begins wailing piteously:{/n} "Lord Captain, please help me! These beasts want to cut off my legs! I was a senior gunner on a macro-cannon. I lost my legs in my youth — it was only thanks to my implant I was able to fulfil my duty, guiding teams of haulers! And now they say that that's it, I have to give my legs back, but how can I give them back? Butchers!"

Ces monstres veulent me couper les jambes ! J'étais artilleur en chef sur un macro-canon. Après avoir perdu mes jambes dans ma jeunesse, c'est uniquement grâce à mes implants que j'ai pu accomplir mon devoir en guidant des équipes de transporteurs ! Et maintenant qu'ils considèrent que je suis bon à mettre au rebut, ils veulent que je rende mes jambes... mais comment le pourrais-je ? Des bouchers, voilà ce qu'ils sont ! »

languages.text: {n}Der hektische Blick des alten Mannes fällt auf dich, und er jammert erbarmungswürdig:{/n} "Lord Captain, bitte helft mir! Diese Bestien wollen meine Beine abschneiden! Ich war leitender Schütze an einer Makrokanone. Meine Beine habe ich schon in der Jugend verloren – nur dank meines Implantats konnte ich meine Pflicht erfüllen und Schlepperteams anführen! Und jetzt sagen sie, das war's, ich muss meine Beine zurückgeben, aber wie kann ich das? Fleischer allesamt!"
